prompt: Single-purpose PR: bump cosmo's the-valley flake input so classic-laddie picks up the just-merged mirror-push fix (gunk-dev/the-valley#18: explicit head/tag refspecs + --prune instead of --mirror in the valley-host post-receive hook). Run 'nix flake lock --update-input the-valley', verify the locked rev is the-valley's current main tip (git ls-remote https://github.com/gunk-dev/the-valley refs/heads/main must equal .nodes.the-valley.locked.rev in flake.lock), and confirm the locked rev's nix/valley-host.nix contains the new 'push --prune' invocation and no 'git push --mirror'. Touch ONLY flake.lock. Verify: nix flake check; nix eval .#nixosConfigurations.classic-laddie.config.system.build.toplevel.drvPath. PR body: one paragraph — what the upstream fix changes and that the converge loop deploys it on merge; this precedes populating the-valley's primary on the valley host (migration Phase 1).
